# Implementation Plan: Document Upload and Management

**Branch**: `001-document-management` | **Date**: 2026-05-10 | **Spec**: [specs/001-document-management/spec.md](../001-document-management/spec.md)  
**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/001-document-management/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command on 2026-05-10.

## Summary

Contoso Dashboard requires a document management system enabling 5,000 employees to upload, organize, search, and share work-related documents (PDF, Office, images, text). The feature integrates with existing dashboard capabilities while maintaining RBAC security (Employee, Team Lead, Project Manager, Admin). MVP priorities: upload documents (P1), view my documents (P1), search/filter (P2), sharing (P2), deletion (P2). Metadata handling and versioning deferred to P3. Implementation prioritizes local file storage with clear cloud migration paths per training architecture.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: C# with .NET 10.0  
**Primary Dependencies**: ASP.NET Core 8.0, Blazor Server, Entity Framework Core 8.0.0, SQL Server LocalDB  
**Storage**: SQL Server LocalDB (development/training); file storage in `AppData/uploads` directory outside web root  
**Testing**: xUnit with integration test support  
**Target Platform**: Web application (ASP.NET Core Blazor Server)  
**Project Type**: Single web project with Razor components and service layer  
**Performance Goals**:  
- Document search results: 2 seconds  
- File upload completion: 30 seconds (up to 25 MB)  
- Document list page load: 2 seconds (up to 500 documents)  
- File preview load (browser): <1 second for PDF/images  

**Constraints**:  
- Maximum file size: 25 MB per file  
- Supported file types: PDF, Word (docx), Excel (xlsx), PowerPoint (pptx), JPEG, PNG, text  
- Antivirus scanning required before storage; block upload if scanning unavailable  
- No client-side resumable uploads (v1); simple form-based single/multi-file selection  
- Offline file staging not implemented (v1); queue feature deferred  

**Scale/Scope**:  
- User base: 5,000 employees  
- Expected storage per user: ~500 MB average  
- Estimated MVP timeline: 6-8 weeks development + testing  
- Phased rollout: MVP first (upload, my docs, deletion), then search (P2), then sharing (P2), then metadata/versioning (P3)

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

✅ **Transparency with Training Purpose**: Document management is a common enterprise pattern and provides clear learning value for Blazor/EF Core/file handling.  
✅ **Security as Example**: RFC 9110 authorization patterns will be modeled in services; approval paths and audit logging demonstrate defense-in-depth.  
✅ **Verified Learning**: Feature originates from specification with acceptance scenarios; implementation will include unit/integration tests per constitution.  
✅ **Offline-First with Migration Clarity**: Local file storage and LocalDB are default; SQL Server migration and Azure Blob Storage paths will be documented but not implemented.  
✅ **Documentation & Process Discipline**: Work follows Spec Kit (spec → plan → tasks → implement); PRs will reference this plan and constitution v1.0.0.

**Violations**: None identified. Feature aligns with all five pillars of the constitution.

```text
ContosoDashboard/
├── Pages/
│   ├── Documents.razor        # Main documents page (MVP)
│   ├── DocumentDetails.razor  # Document view/download page
│   └── DocumentUpload.razor   # Upload form component
├── Components/
│   ├── DocumentList.razor     # Reusable document list component

├── Models/
│   ├── Document.cs            # Core entity
│   ├── DocumentShare.cs       # Sharing relationship entity
│   ├── DocumentCategory.cs    # Enum for categories
│   └── DocumentUploadDTO.cs   # Transfer object for uploads
├── Services/
│   ├── DocumentService.cs     # Main orchestration service
│   ├── FileStorageService.cs  # Local file operations
│   ├── DocumentSearchService.cs # Search/filter logic
│   ├── DocumentAuthService.cs # Authorization checks (IDOR protection)
│   └── DocumentAuditService.cs# Logging and audit trail
├── Data/
│   ├── ApplicationDbContext.cs # Updated with Document models
│   └── Migrations/
│       └── [DateStamp]_AddDocumentManagement.cs
└── wwwroot/
    └── documents/
        └── [Generated GUID files stored server-side, not exposed]

Tests/
├── DocumentServiceTests.cs
├── DocumentAuthorizationTests.cs
├── DocumentUploadTests.cs
└── DocumentSearchTests.cs
```

**Structure Decision**: Single web project architecture (existing ContosoDashboard pattern). Documents are served from protected server endpoints; physical files stored outside web root in `AppData/uploads/`. Service layer handles all authorization and file operations. Blazor components consume DocumentService API. This maintains security isolation and supports future migration to centralized services.

## Complexity Tracking

> No Constitution Check violations identified. All architectural decisions align with training first-principles and offline-capability priority.

| Aspect | Decision | Rationale |
|--------|----------|-----------|
| Antivirus Integration | Block uploads if service unavailable | Security-first approach; no fallback for unscanned files |
| File Storage Location | `AppData/uploads/` outside web root | Prevents directory traversal; supports offline file access; clear migration path to cloud |
| Search Performance | In-memory LINQ search for MVP (500 doc limit) | LocalDB query + LINQ filtering sufficient for training scale; future: full-text search index if needed |
| Re-sharing Policy | Propietario-only; no recursive sharing | Simplifies auth model; matches enterprise policy examples |
| Archived Document Visibility | Shown with "ARCHIVADO" badge | Preserves audit trail; visual distinction prevents confusion |
| User Deactivation Impact | No automatic revocation of shared access | Maintains collaboration continuity; real-world enterprise pattern |

---

# Phase 0: Research & Clarifications

## Research Synthesis

All clarification questions have been resolved during the `/speckit.clarify` session (2026-05-10). Key decisions made:

### 1. Project Deletion Lifecycle
**Question**: What happens to documents when a project is deleted?  
**Decision**: Archive documents (mark as deleted/hidden but retain data); remove project association. Documents remain accessible to uploader.  
**Implementation**: Add `IsArchived` flag to Document entity. Filter out archived docs from project views but include in user's "My Documents" with visual badge.

### 2. Document Sharing Model  
**Question**: Allow recursive re-sharing?  
**Decision**: No. Only document owner can share; recipients have view/download only.  
**Implementation**: `DocumentShare` entity stores only `SharedBy` (original owner) and `SharedWith` (recipient). No transitive sharing.

### 3. Archived Document Visibility  
**Question**: Hide or show archived documents?  
**Decision**: Show in search and "My Documents" with "ARCHIVADO" badge clearly visible.  
**Implementation**: Filter toggle in UI; default shows all; filter available to hide archived.

### 4. Antivirus Failure Handling  
**Question**: Block or defer file uploads if antivirus unavailable?  
**Decision**: Block completely with clear error message.  
**Implementation**: DocumentService checks antivirus health before accepting upload; returns 503 if unavailable.

### 5. User Deactivation & Shared Access  
**Question**: Revoke shared access if document owner is deactivated?  
**Decision**: No. Shared access persists; independent of sharer's account status.  
**Implementation**: Query `DocumentShare` directly; don't check sharer's `IsActive` flag when evaluating access.

---

# Phase 1: Design & Contracts

## 1. Data Model Extraction

### Core Entities

#### Document
```csharp
public class Document
{
    public int DocumentId { get; set; }
    public string Title { get; set; }                    // Required
    public string Description { get; set; }             // Optional
    public string Category { get; set; }                 // Enum: ProjectDocs, TeamResources, PersonalFiles, Reports, Presentations, Other
    public string FilePath { get; set; }                 // GUID-based path in AppData/uploads/
    public long FileSizeBytes { get; set; }              // Tracking for quota future use
    public string MimeType { get; set; }                 // e.g., application/pdf
    public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }             // Auto-set
    public int UploadedBy { get; set; }                  // FK to User
    public User Uploader { get; set; }                   // Navigation
    public int? AssociatedProjectId { get; set; }        // Optional FK to Project
    public Project AssociatedProject { get; set; }       // Navigation
    public bool IsArchived { get; set; }                 // Set when parent project deleted
    public List<string> Tags { get; set; }               // JSON array or separate Tags table
    public List<DocumentShare> SharedWith { get; set; }  // Navigation to sharing relationships
}
```

#### DocumentShare
```csharp
public class DocumentShare
{
    public int DocumentShareId { get; set; }
    public int DocumentId { get; set; }
    public Document Document { get; set; }
    public int SharedBy { get; set; }                    // Original document owner (FK User)
    public int SharedWith { get; set; }                  // Recipient user (FK User)
    public User Recipient { get; set; }
    public DateTime SharedAt { get; set; }
    public DateTime? RevokedAt { get; set; }             // Null = active share
}
```

#### DocumentAuditLog
```csharp
public class DocumentAuditLog
{
    public int AuditId { get; set; }
    public int DocumentId { get; set; }
    public int UserId { get; set; }
    public string Action { get; set; }                   // Upload, Download, Share, Revoke, Delete, Archive
    public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }
    public string IpAddress { get; set; }
    public string UserAgent { get; set; }
}
```

### Key Relationships & Constraints
- **Document → User** (UploadedBy): One-to-many. Document cannot exist without uploader.
- **Document → Project** (optional): Many-to-optional-one. Document can exist independently.
- **DocumentShare → Document**: One-to-many. Multiple users can share same document.
- **DocumentShare → User** (SharedWith): One-to-many. User can receive many shares.
- **Cascade delete**: Project deletion → Document IsArchived=true (NOT cascade delete).
- **Cascade delete**: User deletion → Keep DocumentShare records; orphan check on access queries.

### Validation Rules
- Title: 1-500 characters, required.
- Description: 0-2000 characters, optional.
- Category: Must match enum values.
- File size: ≤ 25 MB.
- File extension: Must be in whitelist (pdf, docx, xlsx, pptx, jpg, jpeg, png, txt).
- Tags: ≤ 10 tags per document, 50 characters each.
- Archive flag: Only set during project deletion; not user-editable.

---

## 2. Service Contracts (API Layer)

### DocumentService (Main Orchestrator)
```csharp
public class DocumentService
{
    // Upload & Validation
    public async Task<(bool Success, int? DocumentId, string ErrorMessage)> 
        UploadDocumentAsync(IFormFile file, string title, string description, 
                           string category, int? projectId, List<string> tags, 
                           int userId);

    // Retrieval
    public async Task<List<DocumentDTO>> GetMyDocumentsAsync(int userId, 
                                                              string sortBy = "uploadDate",
                                                              string categoryFilter = null,
                                                              string projectFilter = null,
                                                              bool includeArchived = false);

    public async Task<DocumentDTO> GetDocumentAsync(int documentId, int requestingUserId);
    
    public async Task<byte[]> DownloadDocumentAsync(int documentId, int requestingUserId);

    // Search & Filter
    public async Task<List<DocumentDTO>> SearchDocumentsAsync(string searchTerm, 
                                                               int userId, 
                                                               int? projectFilter = null,
                                                               string categoryFilter = null,
                                                               TimeSpan? dateRange = null);

    // Sharing
    public async Task<(bool Success, string Message)> ShareDocumentAsync(
        int documentId, int sharedBy, int sharedWith);

    public async Task<(bool Success, string Message)> RevokeShareAsync(
        int documentId, int sharedBy, int sharedWith);

    public async Task<List<DocumentDTO>> GetSharedWithMeAsync(int userId);

    // Deletion & Archival
    public async Task<(bool Success, string Message)> DeleteDocumentAsync(
        int documentId, int requestingUserId);

    public async Task<(bool Success, string Message)> ArchiveProjectDocumentsAsync(
        int projectId);
}
```

### FileStorageService (File System Operations)
```csharp
public class FileStorageService
{
    public async Task<string> StoreFileAsync(IFormFile file, int documentId);
    
    public async Task<byte[]> RetrieveFileAsync(string filePath);
    
    public async Task DeleteFileAsync(string filePath);
    
    public string GenerateStoragePath(int documentId);  // Returns: AppData/uploads/{GUID}
    
    public bool ValidateFileExtension(string filename);
    
    public bool ValidateFileSize(long sizeBytes);  // Max 25 MB
}
```

### DocumentAuthService (Authorization & IDOR Protection)
```csharp
public class DocumentAuthService
{
    // Check if user has access to document
    public async Task<bool> CanAccessDocumentAsync(int documentId, int userId);
    
    // Check if user can edit/delete document
    public async Task<bool> CanModifyDocumentAsync(int documentId, int userId);
    
    // Check if user can share document
    public async Task<bool> CanShareDocumentAsync(int documentId, int userId);
}
```

### DocumentSearchService (Query Optimization)
```csharp
public class DocumentSearchService
{
    // Full search across title, description, tags, uploader name
    public IQueryable<Document> SearchByTerm(string term);
    
    // Apply filters
    public IQueryable<Document> FilterByCategory(IQueryable<Document> query, string category);
    public IQueryable<Document> FilterByProject(IQueryable<Document> query, int projectId);
    public IQueryable<Document> FilterByDateRange(IQueryable<Document> query, DateTime from, DateTime to);
}
```

### DocumentAuditService (Logging)
```csharp
public class DocumentAuditService
{
    public async Task LogActionAsync(int documentId, int userId, string action, 
                                     string ipAddress, string userAgent);
}
```

**DocumentDTO** (Response object):
```csharp
public class DocumentDTO
{
    public int DocumentId { get; set; }
    public string Title { get; set; }
    public string Description { get; set; }
    public string Category { get; set; }
    public long FileSizeBytes { get; set; }
    public string MimeType { get; set; }
    public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }
    public string UploaderName { get; set; }
    public int? ProjectId { get; set; }
    public string ProjectName { get; set; }
    public List<string> Tags { get; set; }
    public bool IsArchived { get; set; }
    public bool CanDelete { get; set; }
    public bool CanShare { get; set; }
    public bool IsSharedWithMe { get; set; }
}
```

## 4. Quickstart & Integration Points

### Integration with Existing Dashboard Components

1. **Index.razor (Dashboard Home)**  
   - Add "Recent Documents" widget showing last 5 docs uploaded by current user
   - RF-027

2. **Tasks.razor → TaskDetails.razor**  
   - Add "Related Documents" section
   - Allow upload from task detail page; auto-associate with task's project
   - RF-028, RF-029

3. **Projects.razor → ProjectDetails.razor**  
   - Add "Project Documents" tab showing all docs for the project
   - Filterable by category, uploader
   - RF-020, RF-021

4. **Team.razor**  
   - Add shared documents between team members section (future P3)
